description: Compare the insect counts of Spray A and Spray F from the InsectSprays dataset using the statistically appropriate method (Independent Samples T-Test or Mann-Whitney U test) based on a normality assessment of the 'count' variable. Save the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/InsectAnalysis.omv and record the test selection and results in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/analysis_decision.txt.
